summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. No GitHub mutations planned; security-sensitive PRs are routed to central security handling and unrelated open PRs are kept as independent active review/proof work.

actions.reason: Security-sensitive credential/state-boundary work must be quarantined to central OpenClaw security handling.
Standalone draft performance PR with unresolved proof requirements; not eligible for close, merge, or fix in this job.
Maintainer/technical judgment is needed on whether the requested test is required before this otherwise ready PR can proceed.
Active contributor PR needs maintainer decision and check repair/re-run before any merge path; no closure signal is present.
Official external channel/security-boundary PR should be routed to central security handling, not backlog cleanup.
Active ready contributor PR requires maintainer review; no duplicate, superseded, or low-signal close condition is present.
Large maintainer-owned docs/comment sweep needs maintainer judgment; no closure or merge action is allowed in this job.
Device-auth/gateway compatibility changes touch an auth/security boundary and must be routed to central security handling.
Standalone active hardening/compatibility PR with failed proof; no duplicate or low-signal close condition is established.
Standalone draft maintainer PR remains active review work; keep it independent rather than closing or inventing a canonical.

needs_human: #89577: maintainer decision on requested fallback-contract test before proceeding.
#81641: maintainer decision/check repair needed before any merge path.
#89369: maintainer review needed for ready contributor fix.
#89585: maintainer review needed for large docs/comment sweep.
